fitness_functions.title: Safety-rule static analysis on shelltutor
fitness_functions.rule: shelltutor (the script file) must not contain sudo / setuid / chmod +s / curl / wget / nc / ssh / http:// / https:// outside explicitly annotated educational heredocs.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: grep finds a match outside a lesson*() heredoc and outside a '# nofitness:safety-rule' annotation.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: bash + grep. Can live as scripts/check-safety.sh invoked from pre-commit hook or Makefile target. No dependency beyond POSIX userland (compatible with AGENTS.md:75-78). Edge case: lesson 8 dnf install hint at shelltutor:346 — the annotation permits this exception until F-003 resolves the lesson surface question.

fitness_functions.title: Write-scope static analysis on shelltutor
fitness_functions.rule: Every write target in shelltutor must resolve to a path inside $SANDBOX or $PROGRESS_FILE.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: Automated check finds any mkdir/touch/cp/mv/rm/tee/>/>> target that does not include $SANDBOX or $PROGRESS_FILE.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: For initial implementation, grep + manual review of each match. Current expected matches: mkdir -p $SANDBOX, three file writes inside $SANDBOX, .progress write, .progress removal — all should pass.

fitness_functions.title: Documentation-code drift check
fitness_functions.rule: STATUS.md 'Immediate Next Steps' and ROADMAP.md current-phase items must not name work whose commit message already appears in git log for the current branch.
fitness_functions.scope: STATUS.md § Immediate Next Steps; ROADMAP.md § current Phase
fitness_functions.failure_condition: Any 'Immediate Next Steps' bullet matches (case-insensitive substring) a subject in git log --pretty=%s for HEAD.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: Bash + grep + git log. Initial implementation can be manual-review-only (audit recommends remediation of F-001 first). Promote to automated check once a matching pattern stabilizes.

fitness_functions.title: Lesson portability check
fitness_functions.rule: Lesson heredoc command lines referencing non-portable surfaces (/proc, /sys, free, apt, dnf, yum, pacman, brew install, port install, vm_stat, ...) must be paired with runtime gate-and-fallback per CONTRIBUTING.md:51-54.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: grep finds a non-portable surface inside a lesson heredoc that is not paired with a nearby 'command -v ... 2>/dev/null' gate or equivalent narration.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: Initial: manual-review-only (lesson surface is small and stable). Promote when ROADMAP Phase 3 begins adding lessons.

fitness_functions.title: shellcheck shelltutor clean pass
fitness_functions.rule: shellcheck shelltutor must exit zero. Any suppression must be inline ('# shellcheck disable=SC...') with a one-line justification comment immediately above.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: shellcheck shelltutor exits non-zero, or any suppression lacks a justification.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: ROADMAP.md:64 already names this as a Phase 2 exit criterion. shellcheck is not bash-only; CONTRIBUTING.md:34-38 treats it as 'if available'. Implementation: Makefile target 'check: shellcheck shelltutor', or pre-commit hook for contributors with shellcheck installed.

fitness_functions.title: Lesson-flow smoke test
fitness_functions.rule: shelltutor must complete a full lesson sequence non-interactively in under N seconds (initial budget 5s) and leave $SANDBOX/.progress removed on success.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: Test driver pipes next\n (11 times) via pseudo-tty; observes (a) exit zero, (b) $SANDBOX/.progress absent at end, (c) all 11 lesson headings appear on stdout. Any failing -> FF failure.
fitness_functions.implementation_notes: Hardest of the seven. practice() reads /dev/tty. Test harness needs pty (expect / python pty / socat). For Day-1, a simpler 'shelltutor -h' smoke test (verify exit zero + known help text) is sufficient and needs no pty harness. Demotion: if expect/python-pty cannot land within AGENTS.md:75-78 bash-only constraint, this FF demotes to manual-review-only for full lesson-flow and to static-analysis for the -h minimal version.

fitness_functions.title: Avoid absolute machine-local paths in governance citations
fitness_functions.rule: Tracked governance files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, STATUS.md, ROADMAP.md, README.md) must not contain absolute paths beginning with /Users/, /home/, /root/, C:\, or similar.
fitness_functions.failure_condition: grep -nE '(/Users/|/home/|/root/|C:\\)' on the six files returns a match.
